server_setup_success: ✅ Server successfully set up! All commands are only accepted in {channel}.
user_setting_success: ✅ Your language setting has been saved.
wrong_channel: ❌ This command is only allowed in the configured channel.
notification_exists_active: ❌ You already have an active notification for {species} in {regions}
system_performance:
**🚀 Performance**
• ⏳ Latency: `{latency} ms`
• 🖥️ CPU usage: `{cpu}%`
• 💾 RAM usage: `{ram}%`
• ℹ️ System: `{system}`
help_notification: 🔔 `/notification` – Set up an availability notification (species, genus, regions, CH-only, exclusions)
help_test: 📨 `/testnotification` – Send a test DM to yourself
help_startup: ⚙️ `/startup` – Set bot channel and language for this server
help_usersetting: ⚙️ `/usersetting` – Manage language, blacklist and shop list
testnotification_forbidden: ❌ Could not send DM – please enable private messages
notification_expired_dm: ⏳ Your search for {species} ({regions}) has expired and is no longer being monitored. You can create a new notification at any time.
dm_failed: ❌ I couldn't send you a private message. Please enable your direct messages to receive notifications!
shop_not_found_suggest:
🔍 Shop '{shop}' not found. Did you mean:
{suggestions}
shop_not_in_blacklist: ℹ️ This shop is not in your blacklist
ch_delivery_exists: ⚠️ Shop {shop} is already on the list!
ch_delivery_add_success: ✅ {shop} has been added to the CH delivery list
ch_delivery_remove_success: ❌ {shop} has been removed from the CH delivery list
ch_delivery_not_found: 🔍 Shop not found in the delivery list
ch_delivery_empty: 📭 The CH delivery list is currently empty
notification_error_species_format: ❌ Error: The species name '{species}' is invalid. It must contain a space (e.g., 'Genus species').
notification_error_both_genus_species: ❌ Please provide either a species or a genus, not both.
notification_error_neither_genus_species: ❌ Please provide either a species or a genus.
notification_error_no_region: ❌ Please specify at least one region (e.g., de, at, eu). Available regions: {regions}
species_or_genus_not_found: ❌ The species or genus '{term}' could not be found in the product data.
notification_set_with_exclude: 🔔 Notification set for genus `{species}` in `{regions}`, excluding: `{excluded}`.
notification_set_forced_with_exclude: ⚠️ Notification set for genus `{species}` (Force) in `{regions}`, excluding: `{excluded}`.
notification_exists_active_with_exclude: ❌ Active notification for genus `{species}` in `{regions}` already exists, excluding: `{excluded}`.
notification_reactivated_with_exclude: 🔄 Notification for genus `{species}` in `{regions}` reactivated, excluding: `{excluded}`.
availability_check_success: ✅ Availability check successful for '{species}'! Items found and a DM has been sent.
availability_check_not_found: ❌ Availability check completed for '{species}'. No items currently available. The request remains active.
availability_check_error: ⚠️ An error occurred during the availability check for '{species}'.
feedback_question: ❓ Are you satisfied, or do you want to keep being notified of new entries?
feedback_timeout: ⏱️ Your search for **{species}** in `{regions}` has been closed – no feedback received.
reloadshops_success: ✅ Shop data has been reloaded successfully.
review_pending_fill_csv: 📋 Fill CSV: `{file}` → click 🟡 on the message
shopurl_clear_none: ℹ️ No URL override found for **{shop}** (ID `{id}`).
shopurl_list_none: ℹ️ No manual URL overrides set.
ch_delivery_remove_no_permission: ❌ You can only remove entries you added yourself.
help_ch_delivery: 🇨🇭 `/ch_delivery` – Manage and view shops delivering to Switzerland
help_test_admin: 🧪 `/test` – Test AI parser without writing to sheet *(not publicly available)*
help_reprocess: 🔁 `/reprocess` – Re-process review message(s) by ID (one or more IDs, space- or comma-separated; multiple IDs are merged into one review entry)
help_export: 📤 `/export` – Export raw sheet data as JSON
help_shopurl: 🔗 `/shopurl` – Set manual URL overrides for shops
help_ai_chat: 💬 `/ai_status` – Show your AI chat budget status (Tip: tag @AntCheckHelpi in the AI channel to chat – images up to 1 MB and text files up to 10 KB are supported) *(not publicly available)*
help_track_price: 📉 `/track_price <species>` – Set up price tracking for a species or genus (interactive shop and product selection, DM notification on price change)
help_my_price_tracking: 📋 `/my_price_tracking` – Show all currently tracked products with last known prices
help_untrack_price: 🗑️ `/untrack_price` – Remove individual or all tracked products from price tracking
help_ai_reset: 🔄 `/ai_reset` – (Admin) Reset AI chat budget for a user or globally *(not publicly available)*
help_ai_prompt: 📋 `/ai_prompt` – (Admin) Show the current AI chat system prompt *(not publicly available)*
admin_export_too_long: **📊 Sheet export** ({rows} rows) – too long for preview.
admin_reprocess_not_found: ❌ Message `{mid}` not found in the review channel.
ai_msg_too_long: ❌ Your message is too long ({length}/{max} characters). Please shorten it.
ai_video_unsupported: ❌ Videos are not supported – I'm unable to analyze video files.
ai_file_too_large: ❌ The file **{filename}** is too large ({size} KB). Maximum: 10 KB.
ai_filetype_unsupported: ❌ The file type **{ext}** is not supported. Allowed: images (jpg, png, gif, webp) and text files (txt, md, csv, log).
ai_image_too_large: ❌ The image **{filename}** is too large ({size} KB). Maximum: 1 MB.
ai_disclaimer: -# 🤖 AI response – for guidance only, not a substitute for expert advice. Always verify information yourself!{cost_part} · Source code: <https://github.com/JonasVerzockt/Discord-Bot>
ai_status_description: ℹ️ Budgets are reset daily at **00:00 UTC** (01:00 CET / 02:00 CEST).
ai_reset_success: ✅ Budget for **{label}** has been reset for today.
ai_prompt_file_header: 📋 **Active system prompt** (too long for chat, sent as file):
pt_no_products: ❌ No products with prices found for **{species}**.
pt_select_products: 🐜 Select the products you want to track (multiple allowed):
pt_confirm_header: ✅ The following products will be tracked:
pt_saved: ✅ **{count}** product(s) are now being tracked for you.
pt_tracking_announced: 🎯 **{user}** is now tracking the price for **{species}** at **{shop}** ({count} product(s))!
pt_already_tracking: ℹ️ These products are already being tracked.
pt_timeout: ⏱️ Timed out – please run the command again.
pt_list_empty: 📭 You are not tracking any products. Use `/track_price` to get started.
pt_untrack_select: 🗑️ Select products you no longer want to track:
pt_untrack_none: 📭 You are not tracking any products.
